programme.title: Uncle Drew
programme.desc: An anti-ageist comedy about a man's dream to win the Rucker Classic street ball tournament in Harlem.

programme.title: Peeples
programme.desc: Wade Walker crashes the Peeples annual reunion to ask for their precious daughter Grace's hand in marriage.

programme.title: The Bank Job
programme.desc: Robbers target safe deposit boxes worth millions in cash along with a treasure trove of dirty secrets.

programme.title: Crank
programme.desc: An assassin learns his rival has injected him with a poison that will kill him if his heart rate drops.

programme.title: Lock, Stock & Two Smoking Barrels
programme.desc: When four criminals lose a rigged poker game against a kingpin, he gives them one week to settle their debt.

programme.title: Dirty Girl
programme.desc: Rebellious 80s high school student Danielle runs away to find her birth father.

programme.title: My Dead Boyfriend
programme.desc: A woman discovers who her couch potato boyfriend really was after she finds him dead at home.

programme.title: Fifty Shades of Black
programme.desc: A college student meets a wealthy businessman whose sexual practices put a strain on their relationship.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Splinter senses his four turtle disciples have grown apart and need to bond to defeat an ancient monster.

programme.title: The Promise
programme.desc: An Armenian man struggles to keep his family and loved ones safe from genocide by the Turkish army during WWI.

programme.title: Never Back Down
programme.desc: A rebellious teen starts at a new school, where he becomes caught up in the underground fight scene.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Zane, an astronomer, discovers intelligent alien life. But the aliens are keeping a deadly secret.

programme.title: The Forbidden Kingdom
programme.desc: An American teen joins up with a band of martial arts warriors in order to free the imprisoned Monkey King.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: MovieSphere provides Hollywood movies, blockbuster hits, and general entertainment programming.
